<> To replace one url with another within a string in php use preg_replace with a regex pattern that matches the url and replaces it with the new url $string = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $replacement = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $pattern = "/]+\">http:\/\/stackoverflow\.com\/[^\">]+<\/a>/"; $new_string = preg_replace($pattern, "http://yahoo.com/abc1", $string); echo $new_string; palindrome example is racecar which reads same forwards and backwards
